query:
SELECT b.id, b.wallet_id, e.sequence, e.event
                      FROM bria_payouts b
                      JOIN bria_payout_events e ON b.id = e.id
                      WHERE b.batch_id IS NULL AND b.account_id = $1 AND b.payout_queue_id = $2
                      ORDER BY b.created_at, b.id, e.sequence
                      FOR UPDATE
